install_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends msmtp msmtp-mta ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
auth_script:
cat > ~/.msmtprc <<EOF
account default
host $SMTP_HOST
port $SMTP_PORT
auth on
user $SMTP_USER
password $SMTP_PASSWORD
tls on
tls_starttls on
from $SMTP_FROM
EOF
chmod 600 ~/.msmtprc
skill_content:
# Sending Email with msmtp

The `msmtp` mail client is installed and configured via `~/.msmtprc`. The `sendmail` command is also available as an alias.

## Send a simple email

```bash
echo -e "Subject: Hello\n\nThis is the body." | msmtp recipient@example.com
```

## Send with full headers

```bash
cat <<EOF | msmtp -t
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Report Ready

The daily report has been generated.
EOF
```

## Send to multiple recipients

```bash
cat <<EOF | msmtp -t
To: alice@example.com, bob@example.com
Cc: manager@example.com
Subject: Status Update

All tasks complete.
EOF
```

## Send a file as the body

```bash
(echo "Subject: Log Output"; echo; cat /tmp/output.log) | msmtp recipient@example.com
```

env_vars.description: SMTP server port. Use 587 for STARTTLS (recommended).
